_comment: Effect definitions — Silencer GAS data. Loaded by GASLoader::LoadEffects(). No C++ behavior is driven by this file yet — it documents intent for the data-driven VFX migration.

effects._group: PLUME — explosion / fire / smoke particles (Plume::Tick type 0-8)
effects.name: Steam / Smoke A
effects.description: Plume type 0. Spawned by vents, player death, tech station idle particles.

effects.name: Steam / Smoke B
effects.description: Plume type 1. Alt steam variant used with plume-steam-a (rand % 2 pick).

effects.name: Smoke
effects.description: Plume type 2. Generic smoke cloud.

effects.name: Rocket Exhaust Trail
effects.description: Plume type 3. Spawned continuously at the tail of a rocket in flight.

effects.name: Flame / Fire
effects.description: Plume type 4 and 5 (type 4 falls through to 5 in C++). Used by flamer trail, flare trail, rocket impact, grenade explosion, detonator, robot death.

effects.name: Plasma Explosion
effects.description: Plume type 6. Spawned when a tech station, wall defense, or fixed cannon is destroyed.

effects.name: Plasma Impact
effects.description: Plume type 7. Spawned on plasma projectile impact or trail.

effects.name: Cold Breath
effects.description: Plume type 8. Rendered in reverse (frames count down). div=4 so 6fps effective. Used by cold-breath player ability.

effects._group: SHRAPNEL — small debris particles spawned on bullet / laser hits
effects.name: Bullet Shrapnel
effects.description: Default shrapnel bank (107). Spawned on blaster / wall hits. Cycles through 9 random frames.

effects.name: Laser Shrapnel
effects.description: Bank 110. Spawned on laser hits. Rendered with EffectBrightness glow in renderer.

effects._group: GAME OBJECT ANIMATIONS — looping sprite animations on world objects
effects.name: HealMachine Animation
effects.description: Bank 172. HealMachine idle glow/pulse animation.

effects.name: TechStation Animation
effects.description: Bank 106. TechStation idle animation (8 frames at ~6fps via div=4).

effects.name: SecretReturn Billboard
effects.description: Bank 152. Animated billboard displayed when a secret is returned.

effects.name: Vent Animation
effects.description: Bank 179. Vent object idle animation (8 frames at 6fps via div=4).

effects.name: Terminal (Inactive)
effects.description: Bank 183. Terminal in its inactive / waiting state (5 frames).

effects.name: Terminal (Active / Beaming)
effects.description: Bank 184. Terminal in active / beaming / ready states (23 total frames: 5 inactive + 9 beaming + 9 ready).

effects.name: Detonator Animation
effects.description: Bank 182. Detonator object idle animation.

effects.name: Jetpack Flame Overlay
effects.description: Bank 218. Single-frame overlay drawn on player while jetpack is active.

effects.name: Surveillance Monitor
effects.description: Bank 151. Also used by TeamBillboard. Looping display animation.

effects.name: Laser Shrapnel Trail A
effects.description: Bank 108. Laser shrapnel during first 5 ticks of flight (state_i < 5).

effects.name: Laser Shrapnel Trail B
effects.description: Bank 109. Laser shrapnel after first 5 ticks of flight (state_i >= 5).

effects.name: Hit Flash Overlay
effects.description: Bank 222. Default hit overlay drawn on actors/walls when struck by blaster, laser, or wall projectile. Per-weapon override via WeaponDef.hitOverlayBank.
